description: src/lib.rs has the pattern 'SecretError::Backend { backend: BACKEND, source: <e>.into() }' / 'SecretError::Unavailable { backend: BACKEND, ... }' at lines 154, 161, 225, 230. Echoes crate-secretsx-bdu0.11 ('Repeated SecretError::Backend boilerplate' for azure-kv). Two reasonable abstractions: (a) two small helpers 'fn backend_err(e) -> SecretError' and 'fn unavailable_err(e) -> SecretError' that close over BACKEND, or (b) a 'BACKEND.backend(e) / BACKEND.unavailable(e)' extension trait on &'static str (heavier). Prefer (a) — simple, local, no traits. Same fix improves all the workspace backends; could be a workspace-level chore. Marked idiomatic-rust,error-handling because it's idiom-shaped, not a correctness issue.
title: BACKEND error boilerplate 'SecretError::Backend { backend: BACKEND, source: e.into() }' repeated
